audit_items.proof_trace: Use-after-free in free_remote() when called from free_connections(). After close_and_free_server() frees the server memory, remote->server still points to freed memory, which is then dereferenced in free_remote() when setting remote->server->remote = NULL.
audit_items.attack_scenario: Attacker triggers cleanup conditions through external callbacks, causing free_connections() to execute and corrupt freed memory via the use-after-free, potentially leading to code execution.
